source.name: Philadelphia event source registry
source.attribution: Official source pages and configured public event feeds

events.title: Carousel
events.description: Take a spin on our glimmering carousel — a piece of history built over 100 years ago! Ride the intricately carved horses, rabbits, cats, pigs and goats or our stationary chariots. The carousel is wheelchair accessible, so everyone can enjoy. Full-day carousel passes are $5 for non-members; members ride free.
events.venue: Independence Blue Cross Carousel House, Main Level

events.title: Makerspace Open Studio
events.description: Experiment with building, different materials, and new techniques as you create during our open-ended free play time in the Makerspace Studio.
events.venue: Albert M. Greenfield Makerspace, Lower Level

events.title: Tot Spot: Petal Party!
events.description: Ages 3 and under: Spring is here! New petals are growing on trees and slowly falling to the ground. Join us as we explore different colors, textures, and shapes of new flower petals in a jumbo sensory bin.

events.title: Noon Tunes Midday Singalong
events.description: Join us for an interactive music program where we’ll play some music, learn a song, then sing and dance along!

events.title: Yoga
events.description: Come relax and practice moving our bodies as we learn some yoga breathing exercises and basic poses.

events.title: End of Day Parade
events.description: Follow the beat and stomp your feet as we end our day in a playful parade from Food & Family up to Hamilton Hall!

events.title: Art Open Studio
events.description: Drop in and experiment with materials and process while creating a work of art!

events.title: Carousel
events.description: Take a spin on our glimmering carousel — a piece of history built over 100 years ago! Ride the intricately carved horses, rabbits, cats, pigs and goats or our stationary chariots. The carousel is wheelchair accessible, so everyone can enjoy. Full-day carousel passes are $5 for non-members; members ride free.
events.venue: Independence Blue Cross Carousel House, Main Level

events.title: Makerspace Open Studio
events.description: Experiment with building, different materials, and new techniques as you create during our open-ended free play time in the Makerspace Studio.
events.venue: Albert M. Greenfield Makerspace, Lower Level

events.title: Tot Spot: Petal Party!
events.description: Ages 3 and under: Spring is here! New petals are growing on trees and slowly falling to the ground. Join us as we explore different colors, textures, and shapes of new flower petals in a jumbo sensory bin.

events.title: Noon Tunes Midday Singalong
events.description: Join us for an interactive music program where we’ll play some music, learn a song, then sing and dance along!

events.title: Art Workshop: Hawaiian Textiles
events.description: Join us as we celebrate AANHPI Heritage Month and learn about Hawaiian bark cloth, called kapa. Design your print by finding inspiration from the different patterns often found in kapa.

events.title: Workshop: Paper Pilots
events.description: Join us as we celebrate AANHPI Heritage Month and honor Hazel Ying Lee, a trailblazing aviator. Design and test your own paper airplanes as we explore the science of flight!
events.venue: Albert M. Greenfield Makerspace, Lower Level

events.title: Please Touch Museum First-ival
events.description: As part of 52 Weeks of Firsts, step back in time to the first World’s Fair in the U.S. at Memorial Hall! Enjoy storytelling from Once Upon A Nation, family activities, and a special performance by the Pride Bands Alliance — all taking place outside the Museum, rain or shine, from 11 AM to 1 PM.

events.description: Come relax and practice moving our bodies as we learn some yoga breathing exercises and basic poses.

events.title: End of Day Parade
events.description: Follow the beat and stomp your feet as we end our day in a playful parade from Food & Family up to Hamilton Hall!

events.title: Carousel
events.description: Take a spin on our glimmering carousel — a piece of history built over 100 years ago! Ride the intricately carved horses, rabbits, cats, pigs and goats or our stationary chariots. The carousel is wheelchair accessible, so everyone can enjoy. Full-day carousel passes are $5 for non-members; members ride free.
events.venue: Independence Blue Cross Carousel House, Main Level

events.title: Makerspace Open Studio
events.description: Experiment with building, different materials, and new techniques as you create during our open-ended free play time in the Makerspace Studio.
events.venue: Albert M. Greenfield Makerspace, Lower Level

events.title: Tot Spot: Petal Party!
events.description: Ages 3 and under: Spring is here! New petals are growing on trees and slowly falling to the ground. Join us as we explore different colors, textures, and shapes of new flower petals in a jumbo sensory bin.

events.title: Art Open Studio
events.description: Drop in and experiment with materials and process while creating a work of art!

events.title: Noon Tunes Midday Singalong
events.description: Join us for an interactive music program where we’ll play some music, learn a song, then sing and dance along!

events.title: Art Workshop: Hawaiian Textiles
events.description: Join us as we celebrate AANHPI Heritage Month and learn about Hawaiian bark cloth, called kapa. Design your print by finding inspiration from the different patterns often found in kapa.

events.title: Workshop: Paper Pilots
events.description: Join us as we celebrate AANHPI Heritage Month and honor Hazel Ying Lee, a trailblazing aviator. Design and test your own paper airplanes as we explore the science of flight!
events.venue: Albert M. Greenfield Makerspace, Lower Level

events.title: Noon Tunes Midday Singalong
events.description: Join us for an interactive music program where we’ll play some music, learn a song, then sing and dance along!

events.title: End of Day Parade
events.description: Follow the beat and stomp your feet as we end our day in a playful parade from Food & Family up to Hamilton Hall!

events.title: Art Open Studio
events.description: Drop in and experiment with materials and process while creating a work of art!

events.title: Carousel
events.description: Take a spin on our glimmering carousel — a piece of history built over 100 years ago! Ride the intricately carved horses, rabbits, cats, pigs and goats or our stationary chariots. The carousel is wheelchair accessible, so everyone can enjoy. Full-day carousel passes are $5 for non-members; members ride free.
events.venue: Independence Blue Cross Carousel House, Main Level
